message:
🐛 Fix exec tab extracting wrong container names from YAML (#2247)

The container name regex was matching ALL "- name:" entries in the pod
YAML (including env vars like NAMESPACE, volume mounts, etc.). Fixed
to scope extraction to only containers/initContainers sections and
match the correct indentation pattern (4-space indent without dash
prefix) that kubectl YAML uses for container name fields.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
